core_thesis: LMs are unreliable calculators but reliable coders. Emit code when the answer needs determinism/precision; reason in prose when it needs judgment.

failure_asymmetry.under_coding: reasoning through a computation -> silent plausible-wrong number
failure_asymmetry.over_coding: sandboxing a judgment task -> loud, cheap wasted round-trip
failure_asymmetry.default_lean: when genuinely uncertain AND a verifiable core exists, lean toward code

operation_candidates.name: computable-vs-judgment gate
operation_candidates.trigger: any step about to be reasoned
operation_candidates.action: ask: single verifiable answer a program could check? yes->code, no->prose, mixed->decompose
operation_candidates.evidence: PoT premise arXiv 2211.12588; DSPy ChainOfThought vs ProgramOfThought

operation_candidates.name: decompose mixed steps
operation_candidates.trigger: step contains both a number and a narrative
operation_candidates.action: split into computable sub-step (code) + judgment sub-step (prose)

operation_candidates.name: sandbox choice
operation_candidates.action: pick interpreter by trust + capability (DSPy PoT / OpenAI Code Interpreter / Anthropic code-exec VM / LangChain PythonREPLTool=unsandboxed)
operation_candidates.evidence: DSPy modules docs; LangChain PythonREPLTool docs; cross-link output-format-by-model for wire shape

operation_candidates.name: result-back-into-LM
operation_candidates.action: inject stdout/return value into next LM turn so model narrates/uses it
operation_candidates.evidence: PoT design: code computes, LM contextualizes

operation_candidates.name: error retry (bounded)
operation_candidates.action: feed error to LM, regenerate, re-run; cap at max_iters (~3) then fall back

operation_candidates.name: precision escalation
operation_candidates.action: re-route the arithmetic to code even if prose started it

operation_candidates.name: over-coding veto
operation_candidates.trigger: about to sandbox a judgment task
operation_candidates.action: stop: no deterministic core -> reasoning not code

operation_candidates.name: always-code-then-verify
operation_candidates.action: emit code for every step then verify
operation_candidates.reason_discarded: this IS the over-coding anti-pattern; folded into op7 veto instead of being its own op

dilemma_cases.title: arithmetic in prose hallucinates -> PoT fixes (under-coding)
dilemma_cases.extractable_op: op6 - multi-step arithmetic in prose is a smell; re-route to code

dilemma_cases.title: over-coding a judgment task wastes a sandbox round-trip
dilemma_cases.extractable_op: op7 - no verifiable answer -> no code; veto the round-trip

dilemma_cases.title: mixed step (summary + total) -> decompose
dilemma_cases.extractable_op: op2 - one task != one strategy; gate per step
